_comment: Simulates KFED's scattered systems: a CRM profile record + a separate training-history log + separate coaching notes. The ProfilerAgent unifies these into one profile the first time it sees a beneficiary_id.

B-1042.note: Strong product-market fit for greenhouse produce; needs help with water-efficient infrastructure funding and export contacts.

B-2077.note: Ready for government procurement contracts once ICV certificate is issued; considering a second production line loan.
